predictions.title: When will SpaceX IPO?
predictions.reasoning: Base rate: Major private companies IPO ~10-20% chance per year when mature. SpaceX is profitable but Musk has repeatedly stated no IPO plans until Mars missions are self-sustaining. Starship development and government contracts reduce funding pressure. 15% accounts for potential strategic changes or investor pressure.

predictions.title: When will there be a half-trillionaire?
predictions.reasoning: Base rate: Wealth concentration has accelerated, with first trillionaire likely in 2020s. Half-trillion is much lower bar - several individuals already near $300B. Market growth, AI boom, and asset inflation could push Musk, Bezos, or others past $500B by late 2025. 25% reflects economic uncertainty but strong wealth concentration trends.

predictions.title: Will Nicolás Maduro leave office next in this set?
predictions.reasoning: Base rate: Authoritarian leaders in crisis face ~30-40% chance of leaving office within 2-3 years. Maduro survived 2019 crisis but faces ongoing economic collapse, sanctions, and opposition pressure. However, military support and lack of viable succession mechanism favor stability. 40% reflects genuine instability but entrenched power structures.

predictions.title: Will Ethereum hit an all-time high again before Bitcoin does?

ETH 2.0 upgrades and institutional adoption could drive faster growth, but BTC has stronger institutional momentum and ETF flows. 35% slightly favors BTC due to current market dynamics.

predictions.title: Will the U.S. get rid of the penny?
predictions.reasoning: Base rate: Currency elimination extremely rare - US hasn't eliminated denomination since half-cent in 1857. Multiple penny elimination bills have failed over decades. Strong lobbying opposition from zinc industry, vending machine companies. Congressional action on minor issues very difficult, requires sustained political will that historically absent on this issue.
